What We Offer

Our Premium Services

From buying and selling to swapping, hiring, and everything in between — handled with professionalism and integrity.

🚗

We Sell

Premium quality vehicles at the best prices in Owerri. Clean, inspected, and ready to drive.

💲

We Buy

We buy old, scrap, damaged, and accident vehicles. Free car removal included. Best prices offered.

⇄️

We Swap

Trade your old vehicle and upgrade to a better one seamlessly with our swap programme.

🔄

We Trade

Flexible trade deals to get you the vehicle you've always wanted at the price you deserve.

🔐

We Hire

Reliable vehicle hire for events, corporate travels, and personal trips. Well-maintained fleet.

🚙

Sales & Pre-order

Can't find what you want? Pre-order your dream car and we will source it for you.

✈️

Car Importation

We import brand new and foreign-used vehicles directly to your door. Hassle-free process.

📄

Car Registration

We handle all documentation, registration, and paperwork so you don't have to.

🔧

Car Upgrade & Custom

Upgrade your vehicle's look and performance with our professional customization services.

🔴

Auto Clinic & Diagnostics

Professional diagnostics, servicing, and repairs by certified automotive technicians.

💵

Easy Finance

Flexible payment plans and financing options to make owning your car stress-free.

🚘

Nationwide Delivery

We deliver your purchased vehicle safely anywhere in Nigeria.

🔍

Vehicle Inspection

Comprehensive pre-purchase inspection so you know exactly what you are buying.

🚚

Free Car Removal

We remove your old, scrapped, or damaged vehicle for free. Just call us.

Available Now

Our Vehicles

Click the enquiry button on any vehicle to chat with us directly on WhatsApp. All vehicles are available at our Owerri showroom.

Why Us

Why Choose Chimamanda Motors?

Thousands of satisfied customers across Owerri and Nigeria trust us for quality, value, and professionalism.

💰

Affordable Rates

Transparent, competitive pricing with no hidden charges.

🥇

Trusted Dealers

Years of experience and thousands of happy customers.

👥

💵

Auto Diagnostics

Quality Vehicles

Who We Are

About Chimamanda Motors

A Subsidiary of Double Shillings Industries Nigeria Limited — Owerri's most trusted automobile dealership, committed to quality, affordability, and excellence.

📍 Branch Office

No. 62 Okigwe Road, Opposite Federal Girls College,
Owerri, Imo State, Nigeria.

📞 08035853086  |  💬 08067780429

📧 NkeNkeEnyi12@gmail.com

🎯 Our Mission

To provide high quality, reliable, and affordable vehicles while delivering exceptional customer service that builds trust, satisfaction and long-term relationships with our clients.

💡 Our Vision

To become the most trusted and preferred automobile dealership in Owerri and beyond, known for integrity, excellence, and innovation in automotive solutions.

💎 Core Values

We operate with integrity, professionalism and accountability in all our dealings. We prioritize customer satisfaction, quality, reliability and continuous innovation.
